titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale College Student Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday November 25, 2020 at 08:30

did.abstract: The records consist of student records and grade sheets maintained by Yale College.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 9-F (YRG 9-F), Yale College student records.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale College Student Records (RU 587). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of student records and grade sheets maintained by Yale College.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

did.unittitle: Student record cards for the Classes of 1947 and 1949M
Professional interests/plans cards for Class of 1947
Student records for the Classes of 1947-1960
Student records for the Classes of 1961-1963

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Arranged by class year, thereunder alphabetically by last name. Non-graduates for the classes of 1960-1963 are listed separately at the end of the accession.

did.unittitle: Student records for the Classes of 1940-1955
Student record cards for the Classes of 1931-1956
Matriculation cards for students in the Classes of 1972 and 1974
Student record cards for the Classes of 1932-1939, 1960-1969
Student records for the Classes of 1975-1977
Student records for the Classes of 1980-1986
Student records for the Classes of 1978-1979
Registrar folders for the Classes of 1979-1991, 1993-1996

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Arranged by class, thereunder alphabetically by last name.

did.unittitle: Student records of the dean for the Classes of 1987-1991

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Arranged by class, thereunder alphabetically by last name.

did.unittitle: High school grade cards for admitted students
Entrance cards (high school grade cards) and duplicate freshman year cards
Student entrance records for the Classes of 1904-1939

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Arranged by class, thereunder alphabetically by last name.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Arranged by class, thereunder alphabetically by last name.

did.unittitle: Yale Army Training Corps and Yale Naval Training Unit
Student transcripts for the Classes of 1954-1977

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Arranged by class, thereunder alphabetically by last name.

did.unittitle: Admission data cards and entrance records for the Classes of 1956-1993

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Arranged by class, thereunder alphabetically by last name.

did.unittitle: Classes of 1987, 1989: A-Leb; Report dated 1990 for Class of 1993[?]
Class of 1989: Lew-Z; Report dated 1990 for Class of 1993[?]
Grade lists and grade change records
1954 Fall - 1955 Spring - 1955 Fall and 1955 DE Grades
1962 Fall Changes/Makeup and 1963 June and Sept Makeups and 1963 Grade Changes
Student records for the Class of 1992

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Arranged chronologically, thereunder alphabetically by department.

did.unittitle: History of Science, History of Medicine
History of Science, History of Medicine
History of Science, History of Medicine
History of Science, History of Medicine
History of Science, History of Medicine
History of Science, History of Medicine
History of Science, History of Medicine
History of Science, History of Medicine
History of Science, History of Medicine
History of Science, History of Medicine
History of Science, History of Medicine
History of Science, History of Medicine
History of Science, History of Medicine
History of Science, History of Medicine
History of Science, History of Medicine
History of Science, History of Medicine
Student records for the Class of 1994
Student records for the Class of 1993
Student records for the Class of 1995
Student records for the Classes of 1996-1998

odd.head: General
odd.p: The inclusive dates of the records are from 1991-1995 unless otherwise specified.

did.unittitle: Student records for the Classes of 1999-2000
Transcript Elections for Yale College Summer Session
Yale College: Yale-in-London, Yale-in Beijing, Norfolk, Enrollment Counts
British Studies Yale in London Spring 2006
Student records for the Classes of 2001-2003 and 2006-2009

odd.head: General
odd.p: Records for the Classes of 2004-2005 were retained by Yale College.

did.unittitle: Student records for the Classes of 2004-2005

custodhist.head: Custodial History
custodhist.p: MSSA received partial records for the classes of 2004-2005. The remaining records are still in the possession of the Yale College Dean's Office. Missing records include files H through K for the class of 2004; A through partial G for the class of 2005; L through partial M for the class of 2005; and partial W through Z for the class of 2005.

did.unittitle: Student records from the Classes of 2010-2012
